notes: Works well out of the box for me : I have tested the first 3 levels without any problem.
title: Kung Fu Strike - The Warrior's Rise

notes: Game itself ran perfectly out of the box. However to change resolution from 720p you need to use the Config.exe or just edit ~/.local/share/Steam/SteamApps/common/KungFuStrike/Content/data/Config.xna.xml directly.
